message.content:
Single mechanical BCG fix in the windows handbook CLI.

## Scope (rbhw* files only — DO NOT touch rbho* or rbhp* files)

### Bucket 2: Missing `local -r` on non-mutated local

- `Tools/rbk/rbh0/rbhw0_cli.sh:36` — `z_rbk_kit_dir` — change `local` to `local -r` if not reassigned (check the function body to confirm — it's almost certainly read-only).

## Verification

After editing, Grep `z_rbk_kit_dir` in `Tools/rbk/rbh0/rbhw0_cli.sh` and confirm the declaration is now `local -r` and there are no later assignments to it in the file.

## What NOT to do
- Do not touch rbho* or rbhp* files — owned by sibling subagents
- Do not run the fast test suite — parent will run it after all three subagents finish
- Do not commit
- Do not refactor anything else

## Report back
Confirm the single edit was made or report why not.

content.text: I'll read the file, make the edit, and verify.

content.content:
1	#!/bin/bash
2	#
3	# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
4	#
5	# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
6	# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
7	# You may obtain a copy of the License at
8	#

10	#
11	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
12	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle Windows Handbook - Command Line Interface
20	#
21	# Furnish: handbook display procedures need buh_* display, buym yelp,
22	# and zipper constants (BUWZ_*, RBZ_*) for tabtarget references.
23	# No regime, no OAuth, no IAM.
24	
25	set -euo pipefail
26	
27	source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buc_command.sh"
28	
29	zrbhw_furnish() {
30	  buc_doc_env "BURD_BUK_DIR          " "BUK module directory (dispatch-provided)"
31	  buc_doc_env "BURD_CONFIG_DIR       " "Configuration directory (dispatch-provided)"
32	  buc_doc_env "BURD_TOOLS_DIR        " "Project tools root directory (dispatch-provided)"
33	  buc_doc_env_done || return 0
34	
35	  source "${BURD_CONFIG_DIR}/rbbc_constants.sh"  || buc_die "Failed to source rbbc_constants.sh"
36	  local z_rbk_kit_dir="${BURD_TOOLS_DIR}/${RBBC_kit_subdir}"
37	  local z_jjk_kit_dir="${BURD_TOOLS_DIR}/jjk"
38	
39	  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buym_yelp.sh"                                 || buc_die "Failed to source buym_yelp.sh"
40	  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buh_handbook.sh"                              || buc_die "Failed to source buh_handbook.sh"
41	  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buz_zipper.sh"                                || buc_die "Failed to source buz_zipper.sh"
42	  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buwz_zipper.sh"                               || buc_die "Failed to source buwz_zipper.sh"
43	  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbz_zipper.sh"                                || buc_die "Failed to source rbz_zipper.sh"
44	  source "${z_jjk_kit_dir}/jjz_zipper.sh"                                || buc_die "Failed to source jjz_zipper.sh"
45	  zbuz_kindle
46	  zbuwz_kindle
47	  zrbz_kindle
48	  zjjz_kindle
49	  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbh0/rbhwb_base.sh"                         || buc_die "Failed to source rbhwb_base.sh"
50	  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbh0/rbhwht_handbook_top.sh"                || buc_die "Failed to source rbhwht_handbook_top.sh"
51	  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbh0/rbhw0_top.sh"                          || buc_die "Failed to source rbhw0_top.sh"
52	  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbh0/rbhwdd_docker_desktop.sh"              || buc_die "Failed to source rbhwdd_docker_desktop.sh"
53	  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbh0/rbhwdn_docker_wsl_native.sh"           || buc_die "Failed to source rbhwdn_docker_wsl_native.sh"
54	  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbh0/rbhwcd_docker_context_discipline.sh"   || buc_die "Failed to source rbhwcd_docker_context_discipline.sh"
55	
56	  zrbhw_kindle
57	}
58	
59	buc_execute rbhw_ "Windows Handbook" zrbhw_furnish "$@"
60	
61	# eof
62

content.text: Confirmed `z_rbk_kit_dir` is only assigned once at line 36 and only read at lines 43, 49-54. Making the edit.

content.text:
Edit complete.

- File: `/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/rbk/rbh0/rbhw0_cli.sh`
- Line 36 changed from `local z_rbk_kit_dir=...` to `local -r z_rbk_kit_dir=...`
- All other occurrences (lines 43, 49-54) are read-only `source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/..."` usages — no reassignments anywhere in the file. The `-r` is safe.
